revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact image size: 64x80 pixels.
- Grid: 1 row x 1 column, one frame only.
- Frame size: 64x80 pixels.
- Background: solid #FF00FF chroma key filling every empty pixel, no gradients, no transparency.
- No grid lines, no borders, no separators, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark.
- Leave a clear solid #FF00FF margin between the object and every canvas edge.

Style:
- Crisp high-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixel art, low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent palette, one-pixel dark outline where useful, top-left light source.
- Bright cheerful mythical-Japan satoyama palette: deep rich saturated greens like early-summer rice-field banks, clear blue-green accents, vermilion and white accents, soft warm sunlight.
- Not dry, not yellow-brown, not western prairie, not wasteland, not dark or gloomy.

Subject:
- One great sacred camphor tree, goshinboku, front view, as one coherent authored field-prop object.
- It fills most of the 64x80 canvas while preserving the required magenta edge margin.
- Broad rounded asymmetric canopy of deep saturated green with sunlit highlights and readable leaf clusters.
- Thick mossy trunk with trunk shadow and root details.
- Small sacred shimenawa rope around the trunk with tiny white paper streamers and subtle vermilion/white shrine accents.
- Soft contact shadow at the base.
- Foreground-overlap potential, clean readable footprint.

Large-object quality rules:
- Draw the tree first as a single coherent pixel-art object, not repeated small tile stamps.
- Break rectangular silhouettes with natural canopy overhangs, asymmetric leaf clusters, shadows, and varied texture.
- Keep all details attached to the object; no detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, dust specks, seam slivers, or residue.

Avoid completely:
- No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, or letter emblems.
- No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects.
- No horror mood, no bird or companion creature, no UI.
